message:
fix(stability): apply pervasive robustness and error-handling improvements

This commit merges several 'fresh-eyes' safety improvements previously drafted across the workspace:
- overflow.rs/db_fec.rs: Fix unchecked math operations and buffer alignments
- cursor.rs: Replace aggressive unwraps with DatabaseCorrupt results and guard array indexing
- Other minor fixes to resolve unused variables, parameter mismatches, and bounds checks.
